sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current positions
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ('c', 'N'):
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        if min(rows) > 40 or n['color'] == 'c':
            print(f"  {n['color']}: [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  W: [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")

# Check green strip position
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  N(strip): [{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}], px={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
